single best one is Life Drain (Chapter 7)
Steppenwolf is easy to get from shop and it's also good
you put life drain on your keyflare support and steppenwolf on whoever
Crimson Pulse gives crit, good for your carry, you can also buy it from the shop
Re-Evolution gives aliemus regen, also from the shop
and you can clear all of story with these 4 basically
theres more but these are the most generally powerful ones id suggest getting
you will want 1 set of each
